column1: # Public domains only. Columns: name<TAB>url<TAB>expect_codes(optional, default "2,3").
# expect_codes is a comma list of HTTP code prefixes treated as healthy.
# claude.ai also accepts 403: Cloudflare bot-protection blocks curl's TLS
# fingerprint on that domain regardless of egress path (reproduced identically
# with no GhostRoute egress at all); a 403 from the real edge still proves
# TCP/TLS reachability through the active backend. See
